src: A person wearing glasses with a variety of casual jackets and shirts. The person has straight black hair and is captured in different outdoor and indoor settings.
edit: A playful animated character with expressive features, large rounded glasses, and vibrant clothing. The character has sleek stylized hair, designed with whimsical proportions and a colorful palette.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object stands facing forward, with an orange jacket. The background shows barren trees on rocky terrain under a cloudy sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is reclining in a chair under a tree with dense leaves. The background includes a pathway and pebbles.
per_image_non_shared_src.10: The object is seated with arms crossed in a cafe. The background features brick walls, a large pillar, and a window showing street scenes.
per_image_non_shared_src.11: The object is seated indoors with a gray hoodie. The background has glass walls with a view of an elevated walkway.
per_image_non_shared_src.12: The object stands before a mountain range and lake. The background includes lush greenery, flag poles, and clear skies.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is close up against a blank white wall indoors. The background is plain and featureless.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is against a dark gray backdrop. The background is simple with no additional elements, emphasizing the person.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object smiles indoors wearing a dark shirt. The background includes artworks leaning against a white wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object stands by a river, wearing a beanie and leather jacket. The background features a wide river, cliffs, and autumn foliage.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object stands with a spiky hairstyle and leather jacket. The background shows an ornate building facade adorned with holiday decorations.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The person stands before a towering landmark arch, dressed in a white hoodie and leather jacket. The bustling urban scene features palm trees and a historical monument.
per_image_non_shared_src.8: In a room with soft natural light and blurred artworks on the walls, the person is in a suit, focusing on their reflective pose near the window.
per_image_non_shared_src.9: At a crowded sports stadium filled with spectators, the person wears a red sports jersey and leather jacket, surrounded by the vibrant atmosphere of a live event.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object stands facing forward with an animated style wearing bright colors. In a Pixar-inspired landscape, barren trees are exaggerated and the rocky terrain is stylized with vivid animations.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object reclines in a chair with a playful animated style under a Pixar-tree with lushly detailed leaves. The pathway and pebbles are vibrantly illustrated.
per_image_non_shared_edit.10: The object is seated in a lively animated cafe setting. The Pixar-inspired background includes stylized brick walls, a large pillar, and a window with whimsical street scenes.
per_image_non_shared_edit.11: The object wears a playful animated hoodie indoors. The Pixar-inspired background features vibrant glass walls with an animated elevated walkway view.
per_image_non_shared_edit.12: The object stands in front of animated mountains and a stylized lake. The Pixar-inspired background includes lush, vibrant greenery and clear, animated skies.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is close up against an animated white surface indoors. The Pixar-inspired background is simple and stylized with soft animations.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object stands against a dark Pixar-inspired backdrop. The animated background remains simple for emphasis on the character.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object smiles in a bright animated room wearing a playful dark shirt. The Pixar-inspired background includes whimsically animated artworks.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object stands by a vividly animated river in a Pixar setting, wearing a playful beanie and jacket. The animated background details cliffs and foliage.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object stands with an animated spiky hairstyle, wearing bright clothing. The Pixar setting features a stylized building facade with detailed holiday animations.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: The character stands before an animated arch, in an illustrated colorful jacket. The Pixar-style urban scene includes animated palm trees and historical landmarks.
per_image_non_shared_edit.8: In a softly-animated room with blurred artistic animations on the walls, the character wears a playful animated suit, reflecting while near an animated window.
per_image_non_shared_edit.9: At a cartoonishly animated sports stadium with exuberant Pixar-style fans, the character wears a bright animated sports jersey amidst the fantastical ambiance.
